faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Sheepshead Bay home?
faqs.answer: Signs include small holes in wool clothing or upholstery, silky webbing in closet corners, tiny cream-colored larvae on fabrics, and adult moths flying near wardrobes. You may also notice damage to carpets, especially wool rugs, or find cocoon casings in closet crevices. Our technicians provide free inspections to identify the extent of infestation in Sheepshead Bay properties.
